caption: A wet brown mudslide has covered a section of rural mountainside road and partially buried three cars on the shoulder, with broken trees in the flow and mud still creeping forward across the asphalt; a man in a yellow rain jacket stands on the intact road just past the mud's leading edge.
annotator_notes: Image matches prompt. `seeping` is closest vocab match for the advancing mud flow (mud not explicitly in closed vocabulary). Cars partially buried under mud weight and debris — modeled as crushed. Tree fallen with the flow, embedded in the mud (no specific target, self-loop). Man on dry road but only a short distance from the leading edge — mud may_spread_to him; he is at-risk Proximity. blocks_access_to the road also makes sense — mud cuts off the road. EFFECT RELABEL (fluid -> already-hazardous target): mud_1->car_1, mud_1->car_2, mud_1->car_3 changed may_harm -> increases_risk_to per may_harm truth condition.
